series_metadata.series_description: This series contains: Special Operations Plan (OHP 0448), Daily Operations Order (OHP 0119), OIU Special Operations Plan (INV 0148), and All Hazards Plan – Field Operations Order (OHP 0117). This series documents the approval of planned actions involving surveillance details, execution of search warrants, undercover missions, high risk deployments, ongoing operations, and bait/arrest operations by Ohio State Highway Patrol (OSHP) personnel.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current, following execution of operation in applicable section. ; Electronic: current, following execution of operation in applicable section
